summary: Frontend-only test of new Export PDF feature on Dashboard. Seeded demo user with 4 transactions (2 income, 2 outcome), 1 budget, 1 monthly capital for current month 2026-04. All 6 feature checks passed end-to-end: button renders in hero, click triggers /api/transactions?month=2026-04&page=1&limit=10000 and /api/budgets?month=2026-04, jsPDF generates valid PDF (magic %PDF-, 20KB, 2 pages), browser downloads Finly_Laporan_2026-04.pdf, success message 'PDF berhasil diunduh.' shown in dashboard-export-message. PDF content verified via pdfplumber: contains FINLY, Laporan Keuangan Bulanan, all 4 KPI labels, Arus Harian chart, Top Pos, Anggaran vs Realisasi table, Daftar Transaksi table, Modal Awal section, and all seeded categories. No runtime console errors from jsPDF/autoTable imports. Dashboard regression OK (KPIs, charts, month picker all functional).

issues: Minor: Recharts console warnings 'width(-1) height(-1)' during initial load before ResponsiveContainer mounts — cosmetic only, not blocking

critical_code_review_comments: pdfExport.js (365 lines) is focused and well-structured; no concerns.
Button state verified: shows 'EXPORT PDF' then disables during export (confirmed via expect_download flow).
Filename format Finly_Laporan_YYYY-MM.pdf matches spec exactly.
seed_data_creation: Seeded 2 income tx (Penjualan 1.5Jt, Jasa 500rb), 2 outcome tx (Operasional 200rb, Gaji 300rb), 1 budget (Operasional 400rb), 1 monthly capital (Sewa 750rb) for month 2026-04.
context_for_next_testing_agent: PDF export tested live via Playwright page.expect_download(). pdfplumber available after pip install for PDF text verification. All FE-EXPORT-1..5 and FE-REGRESSION criteria met. Dashboard data for 2026-04 already seeded for demo user.
